final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [7:0] D,
    output reg [7:0] Q,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK
);
    reg [7:0] unused_memory; // 8-bit unused_memory cell

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            unused_memory <= D; // Write data to unused_memory
        end
        Q <= unused_memory; // Read data from unused_memory
    end
endmodule
